title: Cheese & Garlic Dip
ingredients: 1/2 cup cream cheese at room temperature
1/2 cup Mexican crema or sour cream
1 bag of Ziba's Queso chips for serving
instructions: Step 1. In a small saucepan, heat the crema over medium-low heat.
Step 2. Add the cream cheese and mix until smooth and well combined.
Step 3. Add the fried garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Step 4. Add the shredded cheese and mix until completely melted and the dip is creamy.
Step 5. Adjust salt to taste and serve hot with Ziba's Queso chips for diping.
